questions.title: Design Parking Lot System
questions.description: Design a parking lot system with classes for Vehicle, Car, Motorcycle, ParkingSpot, and ParkingLot. Implement basic parking and unparking functionality.
questions.inputFormat: No input required. Design the class structure.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions and method signatures.
questions.explanation: Create a hierarchy with Vehicle as base class. ParkingSpot should track availability. ParkingLot manages spots.

questions.title: Implement Singleton Pattern
questions.description: Implement a DatabaseConnection class using Singleton pattern to ensure only one instance exists throughout the application.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Singleton implementation.
questions.explanation: Use private constructor and static instance variable with lazy initialization.

questions.title: Design LRU Cache
questions.description: Design an LRU (Least Recently Used) Cache class with get and put operations. Use OOP principles and appropriate data structures.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class with get and put methods.
questions.explanation: Use HashMap for O(1) access and DoublyLinkedList to maintain order. Combine both in LRUCache class.

questions.title: Design File System
questions.description: Design a file system with File and Directory classes. Directory can contain both Files and other Directories. Implement methods to add, remove, and search.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class hierarchy and methods.
questions.explanation: Use composite pattern. FileSystemComponent as base, File and Directory as derived classes.
hints: Common interface for file and directory

questions.title: Design Twitter System
questions.description: Design a simplified Twitter system with User, Tweet, and Timeline classes. Implement follow, unfollow, post tweet, and get timeline features.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design and method implementations.
questions.explanation: User has followers and following lists. Tweet has timestamp and content. Timeline aggregates tweets from followed users.

questions.title: Design Shopping Cart
questions.description: Design a shopping cart system with Product, CartItem, and ShoppingCart classes. Implement add, remove, and calculate total functionality.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Product has price and details. CartItem links Product with quantity. ShoppingCart manages CartItems.

questions.title: Implement Observer Pattern
questions.description: Implement Observer pattern for stock price notifications. Subject notifies all observers when price changes.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Subject and Observer interfaces.
questions.explanation: Subject maintains observer list and notifies them. Observer has update method to receive notifications.

questions.title: Design Order Processing System
questions.description: Design an order processing system with Order, OrderItem, Payment, and Shipping classes. Handle order lifecycle from creation to delivery.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design and state management.
questions.explanation: Use State pattern for order status. Order aggregates OrderItems. Payment and Shipping as separate components.

questions.title: Design Inventory Management
questions.description: Design an inventory management system with Product, Warehouse, and InventoryManager classes. Handle stock tracking and replenishment.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with stock operations.
questions.explanation: Product tracks stock level. Warehouse stores products. InventoryManager coordinates across warehouses.

questions.title: Design Recommendation Engine
questions.description: Design a product recommendation system with User, Product, and RecommendationEngine classes. Implement collaborative filtering approach.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with recommendation logic.
questions.explanation: User has purchase history. Product has category and attributes. Engine finds similar users and recommends their purchases.

questions.title: Design Document Editor
questions.description: Design a simple document editor with Document, Character, and Paragraph classes. Implement basic text operations.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Document contains Paragraphs. Paragraph contains Characters. Use Flyweight pattern for Character objects.

questions.title: Implement Factory Pattern
questions.description: Implement Factory pattern for creating different document types (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) without exposing creation logic.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Factory and Product classes.
questions.explanation: DocumentFactory with createDocument method. Concrete documents implement Document interface.

questions.title: Design Undo/Redo System
questions.description: Design an undo/redo system for a text editor using Command pattern. Implement execute, undo, and redo operations.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Command and Editor classes.
questions.explanation: Command interface with execute/undo. Concrete commands for insert, delete. Editor maintains command history.

questions.title: Design Spreadsheet
questions.description: Design a spreadsheet with Cell, Row, Column, and Spreadsheet classes. Implement formula evaluation and cell dependencies.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with dependency tracking.
questions.explanation: Cell can contain value or formula. Spreadsheet manages grid. Track dependencies for recalculation.

questions.title: Design Plugin System
questions.description: Design a plugin system for an application with Plugin, PluginManager, and Application classes. Support dynamic loading and unloading.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with lifecycle management.
questions.explanation: Plugin interface with load/unload. Manager handles registration and lifecycle. Application uses plugins through manager.

questions.title: Design Social Network
questions.description: Design a social network with User, Post, and Comment classes. Implement basic friend relationship and posting functionality.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: User has friends list and posts. Post has content and comments. Comment belongs to post and user.
hints: Comment linked to post and user

questions.title: Implement Strategy Pattern
questions.description: Implement Strategy pattern for different feed ranking algorithms (chronological, popularity, personalized).
questions.outputFormat: Provide Strategy interface and implementations.
questions.explanation: FeedRankingStrategy interface with rank method. Concrete strategies implement different ranking logic.

questions.title: Design News Feed
questions.description: Design a news feed system that aggregates posts from friends, applies ranking, and handles pagination.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with feed generation.
questions.explanation: FeedGenerator aggregates posts. RankingStrategy orders them. Pagination handles chunked delivery.

questions.title: Design Notification System
questions.description: Design a notification system with Notification, NotificationChannel, and NotificationManager classes. Support multiple channels (push, email, SMS).
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with multi-channel support.
questions.explanation: NotificationChannel interface for different delivery methods. Manager routes notifications to appropriate channels.

questions.title: Design Graph Search
questions.description: Design a graph search system for finding connections between users. Implement BFS for shortest path and friend suggestions.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with graph algorithms.
questions.explanation: UserGraph represents social network. Search algorithms find paths and suggestions. Use adjacency list representation.

questions.title: Design iOS App Architecture
questions.description: Design the basic architecture for an iOS app with ViewController, Model, and View classes following MVC pattern.
questions.outputFormat: Provide MVC class structure.
questions.explanation: Model represents data. View displays UI. ViewController coordinates between model and view.

questions.title: Implement Delegate Pattern
questions.description: Implement Delegate pattern for table view data source and delegate methods in iOS-style architecture.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Delegate protocol and implementation.
questions.explanation: Protocol defines delegate methods. Class adopts protocol and implements methods. Another class uses delegate.

questions.title: Design Photo Gallery
questions.description: Design a photo gallery app with Photo, Album, and Gallery classes. Implement lazy loading and caching.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with caching strategy.
questions.explanation: Photo has metadata and image data. Album groups photos. Gallery manages albums and implements caching.

questions.title: Design Music Player
questions.description: Design a music player with Song, Playlist, and Player classes. Implement play, pause, skip, and shuffle functionality.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with state management.
questions.explanation: Song has audio data and metadata. Playlist is ordered collection. Player manages playback state using State pattern.

questions.title: Design App Store
questions.description: Design an App Store system with App, Developer, User, and Store classes. Handle app submission, review, and distribution.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with workflow management.
questions.explanation: Developer submits apps. Store manages review process. User browses and downloads. Implement approval workflow.

questions.title: Design Video Streaming
questions.description: Design a video streaming system with Video, User, and Stream classes. Implement basic play and pause functionality.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Video has metadata and stream URL. User has watch history. Stream manages playback state.

questions.title: Implement Builder Pattern
questions.description: Implement Builder pattern for constructing complex Video objects with optional parameters.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Builder class and usage.
questions.explanation: VideoBuilder with fluent API. Methods set optional parameters. build() creates final Video object.

questions.title: Design Recommendation System
questions.description: Design a content recommendation system with UserProfile, Content, and Recommender classes. Implement collaborative filtering.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with recommendation logic.
questions.explanation: UserProfile tracks viewing history. Content has genres and attributes. Recommender finds similar content.

questions.title: Design Subscription System
questions.description: Design a subscription management system with Plan, Subscription, and Billing classes. Handle upgrades, downgrades, and renewals.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with lifecycle management.
questions.explanation: Plan defines features and pricing. Subscription links user to plan. Billing handles payments and renewals.

questions.title: Design CDN System
questions.description: Design a Content Delivery Network system with EdgeServer, Content, and CDNManager classes. Implement cache invalidation and load balancing.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with distribution logic.
questions.explanation: EdgeServer caches content. CDNManager routes requests to optimal server. Handle cache consistency.

questions.title: Design Ride Sharing
questions.description: Design a ride-sharing system with Rider, Driver, and Trip classes. Implement basic ride request and matching.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Rider requests trips. Driver accepts trips. Trip tracks location and status. Matcher pairs riders with drivers.

questions.title: Implement State Pattern
questions.description: Implement State pattern for trip lifecycle (requested, accepted, in_progress, completed, cancelled).
questions.outputFormat: Provide State interface and concrete states.
questions.explanation: TripState interface with transition methods. Concrete states implement valid transitions. Trip delegates to current state.

questions.title: Design Pricing System
questions.description: Design a dynamic pricing system with PricingStrategy, SurgeMultiplier, and PricingEngine classes. Handle base fare, distance, time, and surge.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with pricing logic.
questions.explanation: PricingStrategy defines calculation. SurgeMultiplier adjusts based on demand. PricingEngine combines all factors.

questions.title: Design Location Tracking
questions.description: Design a real-time location tracking system with Location, GPS, and LocationTracker classes. Handle updates and route calculation.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with tracking logic.
questions.explanation: Location has coordinates and timestamp. GPS provides updates. Tracker maintains history and calculates routes.

questions.title: Design Rating System
questions.description: Design a two-way rating system with Rating, User, and RatingManager classes. Handle rider-to-driver and driver-to-rider ratings.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with rating logic.
questions.explanation: Rating has score and comment. User maintains average rating. Manager handles rating submission and validation.

questions.title: Design Professional Network
questions.description: Design a professional network with Profile, Connection, and Message classes. Implement basic networking features.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Profile has professional details. Connection represents relationship. Message enables communication.

questions.title: Implement Iterator Pattern
questions.description: Implement Iterator pattern for traversing connections in a professional network graph.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Iterator interface and implementation.
questions.explanation: Iterator interface with hasNext/next. Concrete iterator traverses connection list. Aggregate provides iterator.

questions.title: Design Job Posting
questions.description: Design a job posting system with Job, Application, and Recruiter classes. Handle posting, applying, and status tracking.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with workflow.
questions.explanation: Job has requirements and details. Application links candidate to job. Recruiter manages job postings.

questions.title: Design News Feed
questions.description: Design a professional news feed that aggregates posts, job updates, and network activity. Use appropriate design patterns.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with aggregation.
questions.explanation: FeedItem as base class. Post, JobUpdate, Activity as derived. FeedGenerator aggregates and ranks items.

questions.title: Design Search System
questions.description: Design a search system for profiles, jobs, and companies. Implement indexing, querying, and relevance ranking.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with search logic.
questions.explanation: SearchIndex maps terms to documents. QueryParser processes search queries. Ranker scores results by relevance.

questions.title: Design Microblogging
questions.description: Design a microblogging platform with Tweet, User, and Timeline classes. Implement posting and following.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Tweet has content and metadata. User has followers and tweets. Timeline aggregates followed users' tweets.

questions.title: Implement Chain of Responsibility
questions.description: Implement Chain of Responsibility pattern for content moderation (spam check, policy violation, profanity filter).
questions.outputFormat: Provide Handler chain and implementation.
questions.explanation: Handler interface with handle method. Concrete handlers check specific issues. Chain passes request along.

questions.title: Design Hashtag System
questions.description: Design a hashtag system with Hashtag, Trend, and TrendManager classes. Track trending topics and calculate popularity.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with trending logic.
questions.explanation: Hashtag tracks usage count. Trend represents trending topic. Manager calculates and updates trends.

questions.title: Design Mention System
questions.description: Design a mention notification system with Mention, Notification, and NotificationManager classes. Handle @mentions and notifications.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with notification logic.
questions.explanation: Mention links tweet to mentioned user. Notification alerts user. Manager batches and delivers notifications.

questions.title: Design Real-time Feed
questions.description: Design a real-time feed system with WebSocket, Feed, and FeedManager classes. Handle live updates and scaling.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with real-time logic.
questions.explanation: WebSocket manages connections. Feed stores and delivers updates. Manager handles fanout to many clients.

questions.title: Design Booking System
questions.description: Design a booking system with Property, Booking, and User classes. Implement search and booking functionality.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Property has details and availability. Booking links user to property. User searches and books.

questions.title: Implement Decorator Pattern
questions.description: Implement Decorator pattern for adding amenities to property listings (WiFi, Pool, Kitchen, etc.).
questions.outputFormat: Provide Decorator classes and usage.
questions.explanation: Property as base component. AmenityDecorator adds features. Multiple decorators can be stacked.

questions.title: Design Review System
questions.description: Design a review system with Review, Rating, and ReviewManager classes. Handle guest reviews and host responses.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with review logic.
questions.explanation: Review has rating and comment. Rating aggregates scores. Manager handles submission and responses.

questions.title: Design Calendar System
questions.description: Design a calendar availability system with Calendar, DateRange, and AvailabilityManager classes. Handle bookings and conflicts.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with availability logic.
questions.explanation: Calendar tracks available dates. DateRange represents booking period. Manager checks for conflicts.

questions.title: Design Pricing System
questions.description: Design a dynamic pricing system with PricingStrategy, SeasonalPricing, and PricingEngine classes. Handle base price, seasonality, and demand.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with pricing logic.
questions.explanation: PricingStrategy defines calculation. SeasonalPricing adjusts by date. Engine combines all factors.

questions.title: Design Music Streaming
questions.description: Design a music streaming service with Song, Playlist, and Player classes. Implement basic playback.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Song has audio and metadata. Playlist is ordered collection. Player manages playback state.

questions.title: Implement Adapter Pattern
questions.description: Implement Adapter pattern to integrate different audio format players (MP3, FLAC, AAC) into unified player.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Adapter and Target interfaces.
questions.explanation: AudioPlayer as target interface. FormatAdapter adapts specific players. Client uses unified interface.

questions.title: Design Recommendation Engine
questions.description: Design a music recommendation system with UserProfile, Song, and Recommender classes. Implement collaborative filtering.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with recommendation logic.
questions.explanation: UserProfile tracks listening history. Song has genres and attributes. Recommender finds similar songs.

questions.title: Design Offline Mode
questions.description: Design an offline mode system with Cache, SyncManager, and OfflinePlayer classes. Handle caching and synchronization.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with offline logic.
questions.explanation: Cache stores downloaded content. SyncManager handles sync when online. OfflinePlayer uses cached content.

questions.title: Design Social Features
questions.description: Design social features with SharedPlaylist, FriendActivity, and SocialManager classes. Handle collaborative playlists and activity sharing.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with social logic.
questions.explanation: SharedPlaylist allows collaboration. FriendActivity shows what friends are listening. SocialManager coordinates features.

questions.title: Design Payment System
questions.description: Design a payment processing system with Payment, Card, and Transaction classes. Implement basic charge processing.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Payment has amount and method. Card stores card details. Transaction tracks payment status.

questions.title: Implement Template Method
questions.description: Implement Template Method pattern for payment processing with different payment methods (Card, Bank, Crypto).
questions.outputFormat: Provide Template class and implementations.
questions.explanation: PaymentProcessor defines template with validate, process, and confirm steps. Subclasses implement specific logic.

questions.title: Design Subscription Billing
questions.description: Design a subscription billing system with Subscription, Invoice, and BillingCycle classes. Handle recurring charges.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with billing logic.
questions.explanation: Subscription defines plan and customer. Invoice tracks charges. BillingCycle manages recurring schedule.

questions.title: Design Fraud Detection
questions.description: Design a fraud detection system with FraudRule, RiskScore, and FraudDetector classes. Implement rule-based detection.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with detection logic.
questions.explanation: FraudRule defines detection logic. RiskScore aggregates rule results. Detector applies rules and makes decision.

questions.title: Design Webhook System
questions.description: Design a webhook delivery system with Webhook, Event, and DeliveryManager classes. Handle retries and failure handling.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with delivery logic.
questions.explanation: Webhook has endpoint and config. Event represents payment event. Manager handles delivery with retry logic.

questions.title: Design Wallet System
questions.description: Design a digital wallet system with Wallet, Balance, and Transaction classes. Implement basic balance operations.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Wallet has balance and transactions. Balance tracks amount. Transaction records money flow.

questions.title: Implement Facade Pattern
questions.description: Implement Facade pattern to simplify complex payment processing with validation, processing, and notification subsystems.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Facade class and subsystems.
questions.explanation: PaymentFacade provides simple interface. Subsystems handle validation, processing, notification. Client uses facade.

questions.title: Design P2P Transfer
questions.description: Design a peer-to-peer transfer system with Transfer, User, and TransferManager classes. Handle sender and receiver logic.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with transfer logic.
questions.explanation: Transfer links sender and receiver. User has wallet. Manager validates and executes transfer.

questions.title: Design Currency Conversion
questions.description: Design a currency conversion system with Currency, ExchangeRate, and Converter classes. Handle real-time rates.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with conversion logic.
questions.explanation: Currency has code and symbol. ExchangeRate tracks rates between pairs. Converter performs conversions.

questions.title: Design Dispute Resolution
questions.description: Design a dispute resolution system with Dispute, Evidence, and ResolutionManager classes. Handle claim submission and review.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with resolution logic.
questions.explanation: Dispute tracks claim details. Evidence supports dispute. Manager handles workflow and decisions.

questions.title: Design CRM System
questions.description: Design a CRM system with Customer, Lead, and Opportunity classes. Implement basic sales pipeline tracking.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Customer has contact info. Lead is potential customer. Opportunity tracks sales deal progress.

questions.title: Implement Memento Pattern
questions.description: Implement Memento pattern for undo/redo functionality in record editing.
questions.outputFormat: Provide Memento, Originator, and Caretaker classes.
questions.explanation: Memento stores state. Originator creates and restores mementos. Caretaker manages memento history.

questions.title: Design Workflow Engine
questions.description: Design a workflow engine with Workflow, Step, and WorkflowEngine classes. Handle sequential and parallel execution.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with workflow logic.
questions.explanation: Workflow defines sequence of steps. Step represents individual action. Engine executes workflow.

questions.title: Design Report Generator
questions.description: Design a report generation system with Report, DataSource, and Generator classes. Handle multiple data sources and formats.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with generation logic.
questions.explanation: Report defines structure. DataSource provides data. Generator produces output in various formats.

questions.title: Design Permission System
questions.description: Design a permission system with Permission, Role, and AccessManager classes. Handle role-based access control.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with permission logic.
questions.explanation: Permission defines access right. Role groups permissions. Manager checks and enforces access.

questions.title: Design Document Editor
questions.description: Design a document editor with Document, Page, and Element classes. Implement basic document structure.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class definitions.
questions.explanation: Document contains pages. Page contains elements. Element can be text, image, or shape.

questions.title: Implement Visitor Pattern
questions.description: Implement Visitor pattern for performing different operations on document elements (export, render, validate).
questions.outputFormat: Provide Visitor interface and implementations.
questions.explanation: Visitor interface with visit methods for each element. Concrete visitors implement operations. Elements accept visitors.

questions.title: Design Layer System
questions.description: Design a layer management system with Layer, LayerGroup, and LayerManager classes. Handle layer ordering and visibility.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with layer logic.
questions.explanation: Layer contains elements. LayerGroup groups layers. Manager handles ordering and visibility.

questions.title: Design Filter System
questions.description: Design an image filter system with Filter, Image, and FilterChain classes. Support chaining multiple filters.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with filter logic.
questions.explanation: Filter applies transformation. Image holds pixel data. FilterChain applies filters in sequence.

questions.title: Design Format Export
questions.description: Design a multi-format export system with Exporter, Format, and ExportManager classes. Support PDF, PNG, and SVG.
questions.outputFormat: Provide class design with export logic.
questions.explanation: Exporter defines export interface. Format represents target format. Manager selects appropriate exporter.
